brief_justification: Wrong answer (No vs Yes) but the reasoning approach about do-calculus was sophisticated; Deep multi-level analysis of causal structure, structural equations, and interventional distributions; Explicitly applied suppress/amplify framework to monitor reasoning biases; Verified by comparing observational vs interventional semantics; Acknowledged distinction between observation and intervention but was overconfident in the wrong conclusion; Considered observational vs interventional interpretations but committed to wrong one without examining whether the question might mean observation; Complete derivation trail from SCM to structural equations to do-calculus to conclusion, fully reproducible
